text.title: ImageGenerationService and MultiProviderImageService
text.summary: Production image generation service with caching, retry, and multi-provider fallback; known bugs in the base implementation.

section.title: ImageGenerationService
section.reference: ImageGenerationService with SHA-256 caching and DALL-E 3 / SDXL backends
section.p: ImageGenerationService wraps DALL-E 3 and SDXL with SHA-256 content-hash caching, retry logic, and configurable provider selection. The cache stores provider URLs — these expire in ~1 hour for DALL-E. Replace with byte-based caching backed by S3 for production.

example.code: @dataclass class ImageGenerationConfig: model: ImageModel = ImageModel.DALLE3 default_size: str = "1024x1024" default_quality: str = "standard" max_retries: int = 3 cache_enabled: bool = True cache_dir: str = "./image_cache"

antipattern.description: File-based URL caching for DALL-E generated images.
antipattern.reason: DALL-E pre-signed URLs expire in ~1 hour. Agents resuming after 1+ hours get 404 on all cached entries. Cache image bytes to S3 instead.

section.title: MultiProviderImageService
section.p: MultiProviderImageService iterates a provider list in order and returns the first success. The result metadata must always include the provider field — silent fallback to lower quality is a hidden failure mode.

rule.statement: Always include provider field in generated image result metadata. Silent fallback to a lower-quality provider must be visible to the caller.
rule.rationale: An agent that receives an image from SDXL when it expected DALL-E 3 may pass it to review logic tuned for higher quality — metadata exposure prevents silent quality degradation.

rule.statement: Normalize prompts before hashing for cache keys: strip whitespace and lowercase. Use content-based (byte) cache, not URL cache.
rule.rationale: SHA-256 of "product photo " and "product photo" are different strings — near-identical prompts miss cache. URLs expire after ~1 hour invalidating all URL-based cache entries.

antipattern.description: Passing **kwargs directly to multiple providers with incompatible parameter sets.
antipattern.reason: DALL-E 3 accepts quality and style parameters; SDXL does not. Passing unified kwargs causes TypeError on incompatible providers.

antipattern.description: Running generate_variant_set without rate-limit delays between DALL-E calls.
antipattern.reason: DALL-E tier-1 rate limit is 5 images/minute (12s/image). Generating 12 variants without delay triggers 429 errors on all but the first few requests.
